title: Flowtives 150k - Purple
description: This Recourcepack is perfect for pvp it has an purple style it is an Recourcepack from an Big Minecraft YouTuber named Flowtives.
body:
The Pack is an perfect pack for everyone that plays pvp.
--------------------------------------------------------
![In this image you see all items that change in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3696075995d06866d562e345fafd5064c686edbe.png)
---------------------------------------------------------
The pack was made by TryH4rdd and its the pack from the famous youtuber FlowTives.
He is the 3rd place on the subtiers leaderboard and the 22nd place on the mctiers leaderloard.
